resources:
Notes Taking All Notes Pinned Notes Others Search... Pinned No notes yet!\nTap + to add one Create Note Edit Note Save Note Title Note something down... Rephrase Text Diacritize Text Note something down or click on image to upload image AI is thinking...
Intellectual Sanctuary Next Get Started Skip
Record your ideas smartly Let AI organize your thoughts and turn them into structured notes with a creative touch.
Organize your notes Arrange your thoughts and notes easily and find them at any time.
Automatic task extraction Simply write your thoughts, and our AI will turn your notes into an organized, actionable task list.
///////////////////////////// Intellectual\nSanctuary Welcome, %1$s A quick look at your sanctuary today. Smart AI Suggestion Want to summarize yesterday\'s notes? We found 4 related ideas. Start Summary Now Voice Record Quick Idea HOME NOTES TASKS SETTINGS Main Upcoming Task In 2 hours View all tasks Last edited note Continue writing Edited %1$s mins ago Add Document Review \"Age of Intelligence\" draft Central Library Philosophy Readings Reflections on Digital Consciousness There is a growing gap between our perception of reality and digital systems.
